segments.speaker: 题目1
segments.text: Why did you decide to transfer to this University?

segments.speaker: 题目2
segments.text: Can you turn down the volume?

segments.speaker: 题目3
segments.text: Are you traveling to the University swim meet this weekend?

segments.speaker: 题目4
segments.text: I just learned that Abby and I have the same advisor.

segments.speaker: 题目5
segments.text: Did you apply new associate professor position?

segments.speaker: 题目6
segments.text: Did you end up going to the seminar?

segments.speaker: 题目7
segments.text: Are you joining us for dinner tonight?

segments.speaker: 题目8
segments.text: Which room is your class in?

segments.speaker: 题目9
segments.text: Would you like to visit the campus museum or the park?

segments.speaker: 题目10
segments.text: Maybe the power went out for this whole area.

segments.speaker: 题目11
segments.text: Where can I get a good meal near campus?

segments.speaker: 题目12
segments.text: What items does the campus cafeteria usually run out of?
